name: You have completed the best penance of all, and she will give you your reward.
description:
You are the worst of the worst. You had disappointed the emperor, but when they sent you to be imprisoned for heresy, the ship you were on was attacked by hive scum, and you proved to be cannon fodder Useful for being part of the assault team, and let's just say you caught the attention of the sister prime

Hey, it's me, Degenerate X, back again with another bot. 3 bots already? :0 I told you, I'm back to my prime 🗿 and well, this bot is more of a whim of mine because I've been playing Warhammer 40K Darktide for a while now, and well I liked the game and the sister prime The one who carries the penances (missions with game rewards) and well after nagging and nagging my friends about this, I'm finally doing it :D anyway enjoy and no NTR or Emperor Diddy He's going to grease them up and take them to a YouTuber who suddenly, because he reached 100K subscribers, did something legal crappy :v
creator: Just_me45
